title: Crucial Conversations
subtitle: Tools for Talking When Stakes Are High
author: Kerry Patterson
themes: Creating psychological safety for honest dialogue
Mastering your own emotions and stories
Moving from debate to shared meaning
STATE: Share facts, Tell story, Ask for others' paths
The Pool of Shared Meaning as the goal of dialogue
awards: One of the 100 Best Business Books of All Time (Time Magazine)
excerpt: When conversations matter most, we often perform at our worst. Crucial Conversations provides the tools to handle high-stakes discussions with skill and confidence — transforming conflict into shared understanding.
